title: russelia obtusata
intro: Russelia obtusata, also known as Coral Sage or Mexican Coral Flower, is a flowering shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Russelia obtusata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations, among others. Russelia obtusata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
